title: TDD process consistent with artifacts but not statically verifiable
evidence: _agent_stdout.log describes writing 10 failing tests first then minimal impl; no git history in run_dir to confirm red/green/refactor ordering. BookCollection.Tests/BooksApiTests.cs has 10 behavior-first integration tests, all passing (test_coverage=0.9857).
suggestion: None — artifacts (comprehensive test-first integration suite) are consistent with the TDD prompt; process ordering is inherently unverifiable from a static archive.

title: PUT uses full-replace semantics — omitted optional fields are nulled
evidence: BookCollection.Api/Controllers/BooksController.cs:55-58 unconditionally assigns book.Year/book.Isbn from the request; a PUT without year/isbn clears them.
suggestion: Acceptable per REST PUT semantics (full replacement). If partial updates are wanted, add PATCH; otherwise document the replace behavior.

title: ?author= filter is exact-match only
evidence: BookCollection.Api/Controllers/BooksController.cs:17 uses `b.Author == author`; no case-insensitive or substring matching.
suggestion: Meets the spec (R3). Consider case-insensitive matching if broader UX is desired; not a defect.

title: /health does not probe DB connectivity
evidence: BookCollection.Api/Program.cs:19 returns a static `{status:"healthy"}` without checking the SQLite connection.
suggestion: Satisfies R10 as a liveness check. Add a readiness check that pings the DB if deeper health signal is needed.
